MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-11-2003 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Defendant'S Demurrer And Pltf'S Request For Sanctions; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Willie Cross, Defendant Propria Persona, (415) 822-7445, Moving Party for Demurrer To Complaint and Motion To Strike

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S Motion To Strike Defendant's Demurrer And Plaintiff's Request For Sanctions: 1) Motion To Strike is GRANTED; 2) Responsive pleadings attached to Motion To Vacate are deemed filed effective today; 3) Defendant is required to comply with the Court's order of 10/07/03 and pay $4,903.00; and 4) Request For Sanctions is DENIED. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Willie Cross, Defendant Propria Persona, (415) 822-7445, Moving Party for Demurrer To Complaint and Motion To Strike

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES. DEFENDANT WILLIE CROSS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR as moot because of Motion To Strike. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-12-2003 Continued To Nov-25-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WILLIE CROSS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- CONTINUED TO November 25, 2003 per stipulation of parties. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2003 Continued To Nov-12-03 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT WILLIE CROSS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- CONTINUED TO 11/12/03 PER MOVING PARTY. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-07-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
William E. Shapiro, Esq. of VLSP of THE BAR ASSOCIATION OF SAN FRANCISCO 575-3130, specially appearing for defendant Willie Cross, moving to vacate default and default judgment

RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING as amended: DEFENDANT WILLIE CROSS' Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment -- Motion is granted due to excusable neglect. Defendant has 5 days leave to respond to the complaint. The Court further ordered defendant to deposit $4,903 with clerk of Court 30 days prior to trial. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
